examples: All applicants should be at least 16 years of age at the commencement of this course.
The protracted nature of the commencement speech did not sit well with the restless group of recent graduates.
Jobs ended his commencement talk with a call to innovation, both in one's choice of work and in one's life.
The president traditionally delivers the commencement address at one of the military service academies every year.
Specifically she calls out his 2005 Stanford Commencement speech that others so often quote.
